location: On a corpse against the wall in the first level of Stormveil Castle's wine cellar, reached via the secret back-entrance route (ask Gatekeeper Gostoc at the main gate for the hint).

source.name: corpse pickup, Stormveil Castle wine cellar

tactics: Talk to Gatekeeper Gostoc at the Stormveil main gate — he points toward the side route instead of the front gate rush
From the gatehouse, exit through the wall gap to reach the Stormveil Cliffside grace
Continue up toward the wine cellar entrance
The Hookclaws sit on a corpse against the left-side wall on the cellar's first level — no fight required
lore: A pair of parallel hooked blades favored by those who operate in shadow — built to open deep, bleeding lacerations rather than deal blunt trauma, a tool for ambush rather than open warfare.

builds.name: Pure Dex bleed
builds.why: E Strength / C Dexterity scaling, obtainable right at the start of the game before Stormveil's boss
